prompt: I have a vague idea for a feature but it's not fleshed out. Interview me, ask me everything, don't assume.
Keep iterating on this until the tests pass. Loop on it, don't stop until green.
Why did the latency regression start after yesterday's deploy? Trace it back to the cause before we touch anything.
Explain how the relay publish flow is wired across the codebase, read-only, with file:line evidence. Don't change anything.
Take this whole task end to end: clarify it, plan, implement, verify, and deliver. Run with it.
Continue the relay and hand off to codex for a cross-reviewed delivery on this slice.
This module is full of AI slop — duplicated helpers, dead code, needless abstraction. Clean it up safely without breaking behavior.
What is the current best practice for rotating JWT signing keys? I want official upstream guidance with sources and versions.
Set up a falsifiable optimization mission to beat our current ranking score under a fixed token budget, with a deterministic evaluator and a candidate ledger.
Harden this feature before we ship: run an adversarial QA matrix — malformed input, cancel/resume, injection, boundary cases — until everything behaves safely.
That workflow we just did by hand felt reusable. Can we capture it as a reusable oma skill?
note: turn a just-performed workflow into a skill

prompt: The build broke and I don't know why — figure out the root cause first, weigh the competing explanations, then we'll decide on a fix.
note: root-cause vs analyze: causal => trace, not analyze

prompt: I need to understand which call sites a signature change to PublishTransaction would impact. Read-only, just map the blast radius.
note: impact mapping reads like trace but is non-causal => analyze

prompt: Walk me through the requirements for this new export feature so the spec is unambiguous before any code.
note: requirements clarification without the literal trigger words

prompt: Keep retrying the flaky integration suite until it goes green, and stop once the verifier passes.
Just fix the typo in the heading of README.md on line 3.
note: trivial one-line edit; no skill should trigger

prompt: What's the difference between a symlink and a directory junction on Windows? Quick answer.
Run the test suite and tell me the exit code.
note: single command execution; ralph decoy (no 'until pass' loop intent)

prompt: Add a CHANGELOG entry for the 0.8.1 release.
note: small concrete edit; not a skill workflow

prompt: Summarize what this 30-line function returns.
note: one-file fact; analyze decoy (analyze itself says: for a one-file fact just read it)
